title: 名局解说 Famous Game Commentary
description: Full game analysis of iconic xiangqi matches — authority-building long-form content

tasks.text: Select 10 iconic games (胡荣华 vs 吕钦, 许银川 vs 吕钦, 1979 全运会决赛, etc.)
Source game records from DPxq.com database
Run full Pikafish analysis on each game (identify blunders, brilliancies)
Write commentary scripts using Xu Yinchuan method: no jargon, variation trees
Record first 3 full game analyses (10-30 min each)
Edit in Premiere Pro with engine eval overlays + arrow annotations
Add historical context and storytelling narrative to each game
Create short highlight clips from each game for Douyin
